/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/duck_tracker.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/duck_tracker.dir/src/pid_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/duck_tracker.dir/src/serial_control.cpp.o CMakeFiles/duck_tracker.dir/src/preprocess_kernel.cu.o CMakeFiles/duck_tracker.dir/src/centroid_kernel.cu.o -o duck_tracker   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/aarch64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/aarch64-linux/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64 /usr/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.8.0 -lnvinfer -lnvinfer_plugin -lnvonnxparser -lcudart -lstdc++fs /usr/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.8.0 /usr/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.8.0 -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
